# MouseBall54 Toolbox

MouseBall54 Toolbox is a bilingual developer and practical knowledge site focused on troubleshooting, AI workflows, global affairs, climate and energy, consumer rights, digital security, personal finance, health literacy, study systems, and image labeling workflows.

Primary site: https://mouseball54.github.io/
RSS feed: https://mouseball54.github.io/feed.xml
Sitemap: https://mouseball54.github.io/sitemap.xml
Image sitemap: https://mouseball54.github.io/image-sitemap.xml

## Core Hubs

- Korean Troubleshooting: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_troubleshooting/
- English Troubleshooting: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_troubleshooting/
- Korean AI Trends: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_ai_trends/
- English AI Trends: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_ai_trends/
- Korean Global Affairs: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_global_affairs/
- English Global Affairs: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_global_affairs/
- Korean Climate & Energy: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_climate_energy/
- English Climate & Energy: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_climate_energy/
- Korean Consumer Rights: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_consumer_rights/
- English Consumer Rights: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_consumer_rights/
- Korean Digital Security: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_digital_security/
- English Digital Security: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_digital_security/
- Korean Personal Finance: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_personal_finance/
- English Personal Finance: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_personal_finance/

- English Health Literacy: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_health_literacy/

- Korean Easy Labeling: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_easy_labeling/
- English Easy Labeling: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_easy_labeling/

- GitHub Actions Build Failed: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_troubleshooting/github-actions-build-failed/

## Content Notes

- Economy content is educational and is not personal financial advice; it connects official macroeconomic data, interest rates, inflation, exchange rates, jobs, debt, budgeting, and household cost pressure.
- Troubleshooting content is written around reproducible symptoms, causes, fixes, and verification steps.
- Easy Labeling content supports local-first image annotation, YOLO datasets, COCO conversion, class dictionaries, bounding box QA, train/val/test splits, review sampling, active learning loops, privacy checks, and training-ready handoff.
- AI Trends content prioritizes official-source AI workflow governance: agent scopes, OpenAI API patterns, evals, structured outputs, RAG quality, LLM security, privacy, cost controls, and human review boundaries.
- Global Affairs content uses official-source briefings to connect world events with growth, trade, energy, finance, security, climate, migration, and Korea-facing transmission channels.
- Climate & Energy content uses official-source briefings to connect grids, AI electricity demand, renewables, batteries, critical minerals, carbon pricing, climate adaptation, and Korea-facing industrial or household cost channels.
- Consumer Rights content is educational, not legal advice, and uses official sources for refunds, subscriptions, chargebacks, recalls, airline refunds, telecom billing, fake reviews, dark patterns, and complaint escalation.
- Digital Security content provides official-source routines for phishing, password managers, MFA, backups, ransomware response, privacy, family safety, and small business cyber hygiene.
- Personal Finance content is educational, not individualized financial advice, and focuses on official-source frameworks for budgeting, debt, credit, taxes, investing risk, fees, and scam red flags.
- Health Literacy content is educational, not diagnosis or treatment advice, and uses official sources for sleep, activity, nutrition, prevention, symptom tracking, medicine safety, mental health signals, and emergency preparation.
- Study content is evidence-informed and focuses on retrieval, spaced review, mistake logs, feedback loops, sleep and focus boundaries, coding practice, writing revision, and measurable weekly output.
